title: Zephyr: CCP-11 requirements from da2q context
description: Zephyr implementation for CCP-11 Dynamic Channel Selection requirements from da2q context.
close_reason: Zephyr dynamic channel selection using hash_32 integrated with TDMA/RPL in lora_l2.c + lr1110; tests added; 3 codereview passes; west native_sim + pytest passed; linked to da2q.11/13; independent vector oracles only
